title: The 3 Most Undervalued Retirement Stocks to Buy in February 2023
text: Discussing undervalued retirement stocks usually brings defensive stocks to mind, especially those with high dividends and low exposure to market volatility. While defensive stocks are great for your retirement portfolio, you should also add some growth potential, especially if you aren't already a retiree.

title: GE Spins Off HealthCare: What Happens Next
text: GE completed its long-awaited healthcare business spin-off last week. This gets the company closer to its long-term plan to split up into three focused companies across power, health, and aviation.
